attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SMEAN.EXPENSE_AUDITOR_NOTES_KEY,
NER.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY,
ST_AN.NOTES_DETAIL ER_DETAILED_AUDITOR_NOTES_TXT,
SUBSTRING(ST_AN.NOTES_DETAIL FROM 1 FOR 4000) DV_ER_DETL_AUD_ABBR_NOTES_TXT,
COALESCE(CRT_WRK_KEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, - 999) ENTERED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
ST_AN.ENTERED_DATE as ENTERED_DTM,
CAST (ST_AN.ENTERED_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DV_ENTERED_DT,
ST_AN.NOTE_ID AS SK_NOTE_ID_INT,
SMEAN.SS_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
CURRENT_USER AS  EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_NOTES ST_AN 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD 
ON ( ST_AN.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_EXPENSE_AUDITOR_NOTES SMEAN 
ON ( SMEAN.SK_NOTE_ID_INT = ST_AN.NOTE_ID
AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SMEAN.SS_CD )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT NER
ON ( NER.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT = ST_AN.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID 
AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NER.BK_SS_CD )
LEFT JOIN $$WORKDB.WI_CISCO_WORKER_KEY CRT_WRK_KEY
ON ( ST_AN.ENTERED_BY = CRT_WRK_KEY.USER_ID
AND ST_AN.GLOBAL_NAME = CRT_WRK_KEY.GLOBAL_NAME )
WHERE ST_AN.SOURCE_OBJECT_CODE = 'OIE_EXPENSE_REPORT'

SELECT 
ST_AN.BATCH_ID, 
ST_AN.CREATE_DATETIME, 
ST_AN.ACTION_CODE, 
ST_AN.NOTE_ID, 
ST_AN.SOURCE_OBJECT_CODE, 
ST_AN.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID, 
ST_AN.NOTE_TYPE, 
ST_AN.ENTERED_BY, 
ST_AN.ENTERED_DATE, 
ST_AN.SOURCE_LANG, 
ST_AN.CREATION_DATE, 
ST_AN.CREATED_BY, 
ST_AN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
ST_AN.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SUBSTRING(ST_AN.NOTES_DETAIL FROM 1 FOR 64000) NOTES_DETAIL, 
ST_AN.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
ST_AN.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
ST_AN.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_NOTES ST_AN
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT SM_ER,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD
WHERE
ST_AN.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID = SM_ER.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT
AND ST_AN.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SM_ER.BK_SS_CD
AND ST_AN.SOURCE_OBJECT_CODE = 'OIE_EXPENSE_REPORT'
)

SELECT 
SMEAN.EXPENSE_AUDITOR_NOTES_KEY,
NER.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY,
EX_AN.NOTES_DETAIL ER_DETAILED_AUDITOR_NOTES_TXT,
SUBSTRING(EX_AN.NOTES_DETAIL FROM 1 FOR 4000) DV_ER_DETL_AUD_ABBR_NOTES_TXT,
COALESCE(CRT_WRK_KEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, - 999) ENTERED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
EX_AN.ENTERED_DATE as ENTERED_DTM,
CAST (EX_AN.ENTERED_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DV_ENTERED_DT,
EX_AN.NOTE_ID AS SK_NOTE_ID_INT,
SMEAN.SS_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
CURRENT_USER AS  EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_AP_NOTES EX_AN
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD 
ON ( EX_AN.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_EXPENSE_AUDITOR_NOTES SMEAN 
ON ( SMEAN.SK_NOTE_ID_INT = EX_AN.NOTE_ID
AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SMEAN.SS_CD )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT NER 
ON ( NER.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT = EX_AN.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID
AND N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NER.BK_SS_CD )
LEFT JOIN $$WORKDB.WI_CISCO_WORKER_KEY CRT_WRK_KEY
ON ( EX_AN.ENTERED_BY = CRT_WRK_KEY.USER_ID
AND EX_AN.GLOBAL_NAME = CRT_WRK_KEY.GLOBAL_NAME )
WHERE EX_AN.SOURCE_OBJECT_CODE = 'OIE_EXPENSE_REPORT'
AND EX_AN.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'

SELECT 
 RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SRC.NOTE_ID,SRC.GLOBAL_NAME) + MAX_VAL  EXPENSE_AUDITOR_NOTES_KEY,
 SRC.NOTE_ID AS SK_NOTE_ID_INT,
 SRC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  AS SS_CD,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 CURRENT_USER EDW_CREATE_USER,   
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 CURRENT_USER EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
( SELECT ST_ERH.NOTE_ID,
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_NAME, 
N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE    
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_NOTES ST_ERH,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD
WHERE  ST_ERH.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME  ) SRC,
( SELECT COALESCE(MAX(EXPENSE_AUDITOR_NOTES_KEY),0) MAX_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_EXPENSE_AUDITOR_NOTES) SM_EXPENSE_AUDITOR_NOTES
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_EXPENSE_AUDITOR_NOTES SM_ER 
WHERE SM_ER.SK_NOTE_ID_INT = SRC.NOTE_ID
 AND SM_ER.SS_CD = SRC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
